# BuildConfiguration.VfsRoot property

The `vfs-root` entry (`CKey EKey`), the TVFS manifest root used by Diablo IV. Empty if this storage has no TVFS.

public (ContentKey Content, EncodingKey Encoding)? VfsRoot { get; }
